en-US.title: Plateoffs
en-US.subtitle: Recipe and Meal Ideas
en-US.description:
CAN'T DECIDE WHAT'S FOR DINNER?

Plateoffs turns the nightly debate into a game. Pick an arena, vote recipe vs. recipe in head-to-head matchups, and crown a champion — then cook it tonight.

HOW IT WORKS

Choose a division from the lobby, then face off eight recipes in a bracket-style gauntlet. Tap the recipe you'd rather eat. The last one standing is your dinner.

ALWAYS SOMETHING NEW

Divisions rotate on a regular schedule so there's always a fresh bracket waiting. Get notified the moment a new arena drops and never run out of ideas.

COOK WHAT YOU ACTUALLY EAT

Filter any division by dietary preference before you start — vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, dairy-free, or no pork. The bracket curates itself around you.

SAVE YOUR WINNER

When you crown a champion, save it directly to Curate My Plate with one tap. Your recipe is ready to cook with full ingredients and step-by-step instructions.

Plateoffs is free.
en-US.promoText: Can't agree on dinner? Let Plateoffs decide. Vote on recipes, crown a champion, and cook it tonight — free.

en-US.releaseNotes: Welcome to Plateoffs! Pick your arena, vote recipe vs. recipe, and crown tonight's dinner champion.
